title: Launcher Atmosphere & Theme Systems
changes: Theme system introduced with multiple selectable launcher themes.
Theme-based background images implemented.
Theme-based soundtrack system added.
Music fade-in and fade-out system implemented.
Smooth music transition when switching themes.
Volume and mute settings now persist via localStorage.
Theme accent color system added (--theme-accent).
UI glow colors now change automatically per theme.
Header accents react to theme color.
Footer border reacts to active theme.
Launcher logo aura glow added.
Slow breathing glow animation added to launcher logo.
Logo glow color adapts to theme accent color.
Background motion system added.
Slow zoom and horizontal drift applied to launcher backgrounds.
Ambient atmosphere system introduced.
Animated fog layer added.
Floating particle system added.
Particles tinted with theme accent color.
Particle density increased and distributed across full screen.
Header UI polish improvements.
Theme-based hover glow for profile button.
Logo hover glow effect added.
Dropdown menu glow styling improved.

title: Initial Launcher Build
changes: Mode Select launcher interface completed.
Progression (Ranked Mode) panel introduced.
Casual / Deck Game panel placeholder added.
Image-based mode cards implemented with hover zoom effects.
Active user profile card added to Mode Select.
Launcher footer added with version display and patch notes access.
Patch Notes modal system introduced with JSON-driven rendering.

title: User & Mode Systems
changes: UserContext system added for managing user state.
Role badge system implemented (Admin+, Admin, Duelist, Applicant).
Mode access logic implemented for progression states.
Progression access states added (accepted, pending, restricted).

title: Navigation & Layout Framework
changes: Router navigation system implemented.
Routes created for /, /mode, /mode/progression, and /mode/deckgame.
LauncherLayout system created for shared background, overlay, and footer.
Application page structure established.

title: Project Initialization
changes: Project Onyx web application framework created.
React + Vite development environment established.
Initial project structure created.
Login splash screen UI implemented.
